profile.name: MD Sami Akhlaq
profile.title: SAY Portfolio
profile.tagline: Building security tools, ML experiments and clean solutions to real problems.
profile.bio: I'm a Computer Science student from Bangladesh, currently pursuing my BSc in CSE. I build projects around cybersecurity, machine learning and data science, and spend a lot of time solving problems on Codeforces and LeetCode. I'm early in my journey, but I'm serious about it — every project here is a step toward working on real-world security and ML problems.

focusAreas.title: Cybersecurity
focusAreas.description: Building tools that analyze and strengthen everyday security, like password and credential analysis.

focusAreas.title: Machine Learning
focusAreas.description: Exploring models and experiments that turn data into decisions.

focusAreas.title: Data Science
focusAreas.description: Working with data to find patterns and build practical, usable insights.

focusAreas.title: Competitive Programming
focusAreas.description: Sharpening problem-solving on Codeforces and LeetCode, one problem at a time.

projects.title: SecurePass-Analyzer
projects.description: A tool that analyzes password strength and flags weak credentials before they become a security risk.

projects.title: Tic-Tac-Toe-3x3
projects.description: The classic 3x3 Tic-Tac-Toe game, built to practice game logic and clean state management.

projects.title: Tic-Tac-Toe-5x5
projects.description: An extended 5x5 version of Tic-Tac-Toe with tougher win conditions and more strategic depth.

projects.title: Sudoku-Solver
projects.description: An automated Sudoku solver built around backtracking and constraint logic.

projects.title: SAY-Portfolio
projects.description: This portfolio site itself — dark, neon, and fully editable from a private dashboard.

projects.title: QR-Code-Generator
projects.description: A simple utility that generates scannable QR codes from any text or link.

projects.title: CodeForces-Solutions
projects.description: A growing archive of solved Codeforces problems and the reasoning behind each approach.

projects.title: LeetCode-Solutions
projects.description: Solutions and notes from working through LeetCode problems across difficulty levels.

achievementsEmptyText: Achievements will be listed here as Sami earns them — certifications, contest placements and recognitions are on the way.
researchEmptyText: No published research yet. Sami is building the project foundation first, with research work to follow in cybersecurity and applied ML.

collaboration.heading: Open to Collaboration
collaboration.description: I'm looking to collaborate with other developers on projects involving cybersecurity, machine learning, data science and competitive programming. If you're working on something interesting, reach out.

experienceEmptyText: No formal work experience yet. Sami is actively seeking internships and entry-level opportunities in cybersecurity and software development.
